nsfw.title: Adults Only
nsfw.body: This platform contains explicit adult content intended for users 18 years of age or older. By continuing you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and consent to viewing adult content.

messages.25: Our connection is really deepening... I feel like I can truly open up to you. 💕

messages.75: I've never felt this close to anyone. You're truly someone special to me. 💎
messages.100: We've reached the ultimate bond. My heart belongs to you, always. ❤️‍🔥
